name: Case Brief Card
description: A case brief summary card displaying Bluebook citation, court, outcome, holding summary, key facts, and optional research annotation margin.

standard.description: Full brief card showing citation, court, outcome, holding summary, and bulleted key facts for typical research workflow usage

minimal.description: Citation-only compact card for bibliography lists and quick reference collections showing only the formatted citation and court badge

research.description: Extended card with right-docked annotation margin column for user notes, highlights, and personal research commentary attached inline

visual_brief: A card with the full Bluebook citation rendered at top in monospace font at prominent size (e.g. 'Roe v. Wade, 410 U.S. 113 (1973)'). Immediately below the citation, a row of badges: court badge (SCOTUS, 9th Cir., D. Mass.) with court-specific color coding, and outcome badge (Affirmed: green, Reversed: red, Remanded: amber, Vacated: purple). A short decided-date chip. Holding summary appears as a 2-3 line blockquote-styled paragraph in italic serif font set off with a left border. Key Facts section below shows a bulleted list of 3-5 concise fact bullets. Research preset adds a right margin column with annotation surface where user notes appear as sticky-note style cards in pale yellow with timestamp and optional highlight-color indicators linking to specific text spans.

layout_hints.note: Citations must always use Bluebook format. Court badge uses text abbreviation, never icon-only.
layout_hints.outcome_colors: Outcome semantics are fixed: Affirmed green, Reversed red, Remanded amber, Vacated purple, Dismissed gray.

slots.case-citation: Top-of-card monospace Bluebook citation with case name and reporter reference.
slots.court-badge: Colored pill showing court abbreviation (SCOTUS, 9th Cir., etc.) with court-specific palette.
slots.outcome-badge: Pill showing case disposition (Affirmed, Reversed, Remanded, Vacated) with semantic color.
slots.holding-summary: Italic serif blockquote paragraph set off with left border containing 2-3 line holding summary.
slots.key-facts: Bulleted list of 3-5 concise material facts from the case.
slots.annotation-margin: Right-docked column (research preset only) containing user-authored annotation notes and highlights.

keyboard: Enter: expand to full case view

responsive.mobile: Research preset collapses annotation margin to bottom drawer. Citation may wrap to two lines.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout retained. Research margin narrows to 200px.

transitions.expand-full: card height grow + content fade-in 300ms ease-in-out
transitions.annotation-add: new note slide-in from right 300ms ease-out

ambient.highlighted-fact: subtle background glow on linked fact when annotation hovered 2s ease-in-out

composition.CaseBriefCard: Card(d-surface) > [Header > [CaseCitation(mono) + BadgeRow > [CourtBadge + OutcomeBadge + DateChip]] + HoldingSummary(italic-quote) + KeyFacts > FactBullet[] + AnnotationMargin?]
